outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to negative aggregate GEX and extreme PCR, amplifying downside risk.
outlook.summary: Bearish sentiment dominates across all expirations, evidenced by extreme Put/Call ratios and a volatility smirk. Spot is pinned near the 0DTE Max Pain at 711, but negative aggregate GEX creates a highly volatile environment prone to sharp directional moves. The Weekly Gamma Flip at 708.85 is the critical inflection point.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain is virtually at the current spot price, creating a strong magnetic gravitational pull for intraday pinning.
Weekly Gamma Flip level. Spot trading below this flips structural dynamics to short gamma, accelerating volatility.
Massive Put OI in both Weekly and Monthly expirations, combined with heavy Call OI, creating a major structural floor.
Significant Call OI resistance present across all three expirations, validated by the bearish volatility skew.
Highest individual Put OI in the Weekly expiration, acting as a deep bearish barrier and downside target.
Dominant 0DTE Call OI capping immediate upside intraday momentum.
